ORDER GRANTING ATTORNEY'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF

A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, nor objection. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2010 Continued To Nov-01-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiffs are sanctioned $350.00 each, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 11/01/2010 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
